title: Etheriym
description: modpack about Etherology and oritech? and to many other mod
body: Hello! This is a modpack called Etheriym. It's a collection of mods that I simply like. Here you'll be able to cook the most delicious food, engage in archaeology, explore the world. Or perhaps machinery and automation are more to your taste? Or maybe you prefer magic more? Whatever you're into, you'll enjoy playing this!
